svg.title: Data analytics methodology for Superstore Sales
svg.desc: Five-phase analytics workflow from data understanding to insights and recommendations

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What data quality checks should I run on the Superstore Sales dataset?')
g.text: Profile 21 columns · Check nulls & duplicates · Verify date formats · Understand order grain

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are the best business questions to answer with the Superstore Sales dataset?')
g.text: Profitability · Customer behavior · Discount impact · Regional performance · Shipping efficiency

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Walk me through exploratory data analysis steps for the Superstore dataset')
g.text: Sales vs Profit scatter · Discount–margin correlation
Monthly sales trends · Category & sub-category breakdowns

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I do RFM segmentation on the Superstore dataset?')
g.text: RFM customer segmentation · Cohort analysis · Margin by sub-category · Regional benchmarking

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I perform RFM segmentation on this data?')
sendPrompt('How do I run a cohort analysis on Superstore orders?')
sendPrompt('How do discounts affect profit in this dataset?')
sendPrompt('Which states and cities are most and least profitable?')
sendPrompt('What kind of recommendations should I produce from this analytics project?')
g.text: Translate findings into concrete decisions · Prioritize by business impact · Quantify opportunity

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I analyze the Superstore data with Python pandas?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a Tableau dashboard for Superstore Sales?')
sendPrompt('What SQL queries are useful for Superstore analytics?')
sendPrompt('How do I use Excel for sales data analysis?')
